channel.title: Mayur Rathi's Blog
channel.description: Articles, tutorials, and thoughts on AI, cloud, community building, and tech trends.

item.title: Building AI Communities from Zero to Thousands
item.description: How I scaled GDG Cloud Bhopal from 21 to 2,400+ members in under 12 months — the playbook behind grassroots developer community building.

item.title: The GenAI Hackathon Playbook: Lessons from 1,100+ Participants
item.description: What I learned orchestrating Capgemini's largest GenAI hackathon — from ideation to 24 client-ready use cases.

item.title: Driving 300% Growth in Cloud Certifications — A Program Manager's Approach
item.description: The systems and SOPs behind achieving a 300% YoY increase in technical certifications at scale.
